channel.title: Law & Ethics of Human Rights
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Law & Ethics of Human Rights

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Michael W. Dowdle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lehr-2024-frontmatter2

item.title: The Religion of Illiberals and the Anti-Gender Backlash
item.description: Article by Michael W. Dowdle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lehr-2024-2008

item.title: Excluding Women from Advertisements: Between Public and Private
item.description: Article by Michael W. Dowdle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lehr-2024-2009

item.title: To Die and to Kill for a Multicultural State
item.description: Article by Michael W. Dowdle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lehr-2024-2010

item.title: A Dangerous Metaphor: Thoughts on the Dysfunctionality of the Notion of a “Public-Private Divide”
item.description: Article by Michael W. Dowdle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lehr-2024-2007
